name: Toasted Mushroom Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop mushrooms.
2. Saute for 5 minutes in butter until the mushrooms are tender.
3. Blend in flour, salt, garlic, and marjoram.
4. Stir in cream. Cook until thickened.
5. Add chives and lemon juice. Let cool.
6. Remove crust from bread slices and roll each slice flat.
7. Spread mixture on bread and roll up into rolls.
8. Cut each roll into 3 sections.
9. Place rolls on a baking sheet; toast both sides in a 400°F oven for 10 to 15 minutes.
10. May be frozen. Defrost before serving.
